summary: Replayed ADR 0187 from the latest merged-main integration branch, re-converged the managed seed snapshot store on backup-lv3, republished the deterministic tiny, standard, and recovery seed snapshots, and remotely re-verified all published snapshot contents from the integrated branch state.

verification.observed: The merged-main validation slice `uv run --with pytest python -m pytest tests/test_seed_data_snapshots.py tests/test_fixture_manager.py tests/test_restore_verification.py tests/test_restore_verification_windmill.py tests/test_vmid_allocator.py -q` passed with `44 passed`, and `python3 -m py_compile scripts/seed_data_snapshots.py scripts/fixture_manager.py scripts/restore_verification.py scripts/vmid_allocator.py` succeeded after the latest-main merge.

The production replay `BOOTSTRAP_KEY=/Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/platform_server/.local/ssh/hetzner_llm_agents_ed25519 make configure-backup-vm env=production` completed successfully from source commit `f9069ff533950430503af0ed6c0a18a06a74272e`, reasserting the managed `/var/lib/lv3/seed-data-snapshots/{tiny,standard,recovery}` store on `backup-lv3`.

verification.check: Merged-main snapshot publish and remote verification
verification.observed: Snapshots `tiny-4fc40ef2f916`, `standard-c81d5e556889`, and `recovery-7028dc9df835` were republished with `make seed-snapshot-publish ...`, and `uv run --with pyyaml python scripts/seed_data_snapshots.py verify --seed-class <class> --snapshot-id <id> --remote` checksum-verified each remote directory under `/var/lib/lv3/seed-data-snapshots/<class>/`.

notes: This merged-main replay supersedes the earlier branch-local ADR 0187 receipt for canonical latest-main live evidence.

Template `lv3-ops-base` with VMID `9003` is still absent on the live Proxmox host, so the richer `fixture_manager.py create ops-base` path remains blocked outside ADR 0187's implemented seed publication core.

The restore-verification workflow still reaches restored guest lifecycle and guest-agent checks before stalling on restored-guest SSH readiness; that operational gap remains adjacent to ADR 0187 rather than a failure of the seed snapshot surface itself.
